subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — it's great to hear from you, and the potential synergy you're describing sounds genuinely interesting.

I'd be happy to set up an introductory call next week. We're fairly flexible, so please feel free to suggest a couple of time slots that work well on your end and I'll confirm one that fits our schedule.

Regarding the request for internal contact details and direct lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share that information directly. The right path is to start with this introductory call, and if it makes sense to bring in senior technical stakeholders on our side, we'll arrange that as a natural next step once we've had a chance to align on scope and fit.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
